home.heroSubtitle: Mangala Shri Bhuti Japan offers Tibetan Buddhist teachings and meditation practice in Japanese.
home.forVisitorsDesc: An introduction to Mangala Shri Bhuti for first-time visitors.
home.upcomingEventsDesc: Find information about meditation sessions, dharma talks, retreats, and more.
home.teachingsLibraryDesc: Explore articles, audio, and video on Tibetan Buddhist teachings.
home.donateDesc: Mangala Shri Bhuti Japan's activities are made possible by the generous support of donors.
home.newsletterDesc: Receive event updates and the latest news by email.
home.ourCentresDesc: Learn about Mangala Shri Bhuti Japan's practice locations.

about.title: About Us
about.missionText: Mangala Shri Bhuti is a nonprofit organization providing a space for teachings and practice in the Nyingma tradition of Tibetan Buddhism.
about.historyText: Mangala Shri Bhuti was founded in the lineage of Jigme Lingpa under the guidance of Tsoknyi Rinpoche. The Japan chapter was established to provide teachings in Japanese and nurture a local practice community.
about.studyText: We value deep study of traditional texts and teachings.
about.practiceText: We emphasize meditation practice in daily life.
about.communityText: We foster a warm community of learning and practice together.
about.serviceText: We aspire to share the teachings widely and contribute to society.

centres.title: Centres
centres.description: Practice locations of Mangala Shri Bhuti Japan.
centres.tashiGachilDesc: An urban meditation centre based in Tokyo. Regular meditation sessions and dharma talks are held here.
centres.tashiCholingDesc: A retreat centre in a natural setting. Intensive meditation retreats are held here.

teachers.title: Teachers
teachers.description: Meet the teachers of Mangala Shri Bhuti.

start.title: New Visitors
start.subtitle: Welcome to Mangala Shri Bhuti Japan
start.intro: Whether you are interested in Tibetan Buddhism, wish to begin meditation, or simply curious — everyone is welcome.
start.meditationDesc: We offer step-by-step meditation instruction for beginners through advanced practitioners.
start.studyGroupDesc: Opportunities to study Tibetan Buddhist texts and teachings in Japanese.
start.retreatDesc: Regular retreats for intensive practice away from daily life.
start.step1Desc: Look for beginner-friendly events on our events page.
start.step2Desc: Sign up through the registration form on the event page.
start.step3Desc: If you have questions, please reach out through our contact form.
start.faq1Q: Do I need prior knowledge of Buddhism?
start.faq1A: No prior knowledge is needed. Beginner-friendly events cover the fundamentals.
start.faq2Q: Is there a fee to participate?
start.faq2A: Many events are free or by donation. Some events have a fee — details are on each event page.
start.faq3A: Yes, many events offer online participation. Check the event details for how to join.
